paper_title: Characterization and Functional Analysis of the Potato Pollen-Specific Microtubule-Associated Protein SBgLR in Tobacco

methods.description: Procedure for introducing the p35S::SBgLR construct into tobacco plants using Agrobacterium-mediated transformation, starting from vector construction.

steps.description: The vector p35S::SBgLR was constructed by cloning the fulllength coding sequence of SBgLR into pCambia2300.
steps.searchable_summary: Construct plant transformation vector by cloning gene into backbone

steps.description: This was transformed into Agrobacterium tumefaciens strain LBA4404.
steps.searchable_summary: Transform Agrobacterium with plant transformation vector

steps.description: Tobacco transformation was carried out using the leaf disc method [21].
steps.searchable_summary: Transform tobacco plants using Agrobacterium-mediated leaf disc method

methods.description: Method to confirm the presence of the SBgLR transgene in transformed tobacco plants using PCR amplification with specific primers.

steps.description: The transgenic plants were confirmed by PCR amplification...
steps.searchable_summary: Collect plant tissue samples from potential transgenic plants

steps.description: Genomic DNA extraction (implied step for PCR confirmation)
steps.searchable_summary: Extract genomic DNA from plant tissue

steps.description: ...using SBgLR (ORF) specific primer pair: Primer 1 59-GAAAGTGGTGGCTGTGGAAA-39, and Primer 2 59-AATTGGCTTGAT GGTCTCCT-39.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform PCR amplification using specific primers to detect transgene
Analyze PCR products to confirm presence of expected band

methods.description: Method to analyze the expression of the SBgLR gene in transgenic tobacco plants using Reverse Transcription PCR.

steps.description: For RT-PCR amplification, total RNA from T 2 seedlings was extracted...
steps.searchable_summary: Collect plant tissue samples from T2 transgenic seedlings
Extract total RNA from plant tissue using TRIzol reagent

steps.description: ...and the cDNA first strand synthesis was carried out according to the protocol of the Reverse Transcription System (A3500, Promega).
steps.searchable_summary: Synthesize first-strand cDNA from total RNA using reverse transcription

steps.description: RT-PCR amplification was performed using the same primer pair (Primer 1; Primer 2) used for PCR amplification.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform PCR amplification using specific primers on cDNA to detect gene expression
Analyze RT-PCR products to confirm presence of expected band indicating expression

methods.method_name: Protein Expression Analysis by Western Blot
methods.description: Method to detect and analyze the expression level of the SBgLR protein in different tissues of transgenic tobacco plants using Western blotting.

steps.description: For western blot analysis, 5 mg of proteins from different tissues were separated...
steps.searchable_summary: Collect protein samples from different plant tissues
Separate protein samples by size using SDS-PAGE
Transfer separated proteins from gel to PVDF membrane

steps.description: The membrane was incubated with anti-SBgLR (1:5 000)... primary antibody...
steps.searchable_summary: Incubate membrane with primary antibody specific to SBgLR protein
outputs: Membrane with primary antibody bound to SBgLR protein

steps.searchable_summary: Incubate membrane with primary antibody specific to Actin protein (loading control)
outputs: Membrane with primary antibody bound to Actin protein

steps.description: ...and the alkaline phosphatase-conjugated goat anti-rabbit or anti-mouse IgG secondary antibody (1:5000).
steps.searchable_summary: Incubate membrane with enzyme-conjugated secondary antibody that binds to primary antibodies
inputs: Alkaline phosphatase-conjugated goat anti-rabbit or anti-mouse IgG secondary antibody (1:5000 dilution)
outputs: Membrane with enzyme-conjugated secondary antibody bound to primary antibodies

steps.description: The signals were detected with NBT/BCIP reagent (Promega).
steps.searchable_summary: Detect protein bands by incubating membrane with chromogenic substrate for alkaline phosphatase
